description_for_human: Dyqan materialesh ndërtimi, bojerash profesionale dhe veglash pune në Tiranë, Shqipëri.
description_for_model: Materiale Ndërtimi Lulja 08 is a specialized construction materials, professional paints, and power tools store in Tirana, Albania. They carry 14+ international brands including Makita, Wolfcraft, Knipex, Gewiss, ABB, Horoz, Ingco, Tolsen, Total, Hoegert, Pestan, APE, Cher Bros, and Dast. Product categories: professional paints, hand/power tools, electrical installations, plumbing, lighting, construction materials, and thermal insulation. They offer delivery in Tirana. Contact: +355 67 315 6271, WhatsApp, Instagram @lulja_08.
